questions.question: Indian National Center for Ocean Information Services comes under which ministry?
options: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
questions.explanation: Indian National Center for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS) is an autonomous organization of the Government of India, under the Ministry of Earth Sciences, located in Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: National Centre for Cell Science is located in ________?
questions.explanation: The National Centre for Cell Science is a National Level, Biotechnology, Tissue Engineering and Tissue Banking research center located in Pune.

questions.question: NCS is situated in Noida. What does "S" stand for?
questions.explanation: The National Center for Seismology (NCS) has been set up in Noida, by bringing together all Seismology related activities of IMD. It comes under the Ministry of Earth Sciences.

questions.question: National Centre for Antarctic and Ocean Research is in which state/ Union Territory?
questions.explanation: National Centre for Antarctic and Ocean Research (NCAOR) is India's premier R&D institution responsible for the country's research activities in the polar and Southern Ocean realms. It is situated in Goa.

questions.question: Diesel Locomotive Works in Varanasi was founded in which year?
questions.explanation: The Diesel Locomotive Works in Varanasi, India, is a production unit owned by Indian Railways, that manufactures diesel-electric locomotives and its spare parts. It is the largest diesel-electric locomotive manufacturer in India. It was established in the year 1961.

questions.question: IWAI is headquartered in Noida. What does "W" stand for?
questions.explanation: IWAI stands for Inland Waterways Authority of India. It came into existence on 27th October 1986 for development and regulation of inland waterways for shipping and navigation.

questions.question: Aryabhatta Research Institute of Observational Sciences is situated in which state?
questions.explanation: Aryabhatta Research Institute of Observational Sciences is a leading research institute in Nainital, Uttarakhand which specializes in Astronomy, Astrophysics and Atmospheric Sciences.

questions.question: BARC is associated with research in which field?
questions.explanation: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) is a premier multi-disciplinary Nuclear Research Centre of India having excellent infrastructure for advanced Research and Development.

questions.question: Bureau of Civil Aviation Security (BCAS) is headquartered in ________?
questions.explanation: The main responsibility of BCAS are lay down standards and measures in respect of security of civil flights at International and domestic airports in India. It is headquartered in New Delhi.

questions.question: Which among the following institute is situated in Roorkee, Uttarakhand?
options: Indian Institute Tourism and Travel Management
National Public Cooperation and Child Development Institute
questions.explanation: The National Institute of Hydrology was established in 1978 with the main objective of undertaking, aiding, promoting and coordinating systematic and scientific work in all aspects of hydrology. The Institute has its Headquarters at Roorkee (Uttarakhand).

questions.question: Uranium Corporation of India is situated in which state?
questions.explanation: Uranium Corporation of India is a centrally owned Public Sector Undertaking, under the Department of Atomic Energy for uranium mining and uranium processing. It is headquartered in Jharkhand.

questions.question: National Academy of Administration in Mussoorie, Uttarakhand is named after _______?
questions.explanation: National Academy of Administration is a research and training institute on public policy and public administration in India, named after Lal Bahadur Shastri, the former PM of India.

questions.question: Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development is in which state?
questions.explanation: The Rajiv Gandhi National Institute of Youth Development was set up in 1993 in Sriperumbudur, Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: Central Soil and Materials Research Station is attached to which ministry?
options: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
questions.explanation: The Central Soil and Materials Research Station (CSMRS) is an attached office of the Ministry of Water Resources, River Development & Ganga Rejuvenation. It is headquartered in New Delhi.

questions.question: NCBS is located in Bangalore. What does "B" stand for?
questions.explanation: National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS) in Bangalore, Karnataka, is a research centre specialising in biological research.

questions.question: Indian Institute of Surveying & Mapping in Hyderabad was established with the assistance of _______?
questions.explanation: The Indian Institute of Surveying & Mapping was founded on 6 May 1967 is an institution of Survey Education learning and training. It was started under technical assistance from United Nations Development Programme (UNDP).

questions.question: NIPGR is situated in New Delhi. What does "P" stand for?
questions.explanation: NIPGR stands for National Institute of Plant Genome Research. The Institute started to function in the year 1998.

questions.question: Film and Television Institute in Kolkata is named after who among the following personalities?
questions.explanation: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute (SRFTI) is a film and television institute located in Kolkata, West Bengal, India.

questions.question: Indian Institute of Geomagnetism is situated in _________?
questions.explanation: The Indian Institute of Geomagnetism (IIG) is in Mumbai. It is a leading institute of the country, actively engaged in basic and applied research in Geomagnetism and allied areas of Geophysics, Atmospheric & Space Physics and Plasma Physics.

questions.question: Defence Services Staff College is located in _________?
questions.explanation: The Defence Services Staff College is an inter-service institution of the Ministry of Defence. It is situated in Tamil Nadu.

questions.question: Central Pollution Control Board was established in the year _______?
questions.explanation: The Central Pollution Control Board of India is a statutory organisation under the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change. It was established in 1974 under the Water Act, 1974.

questions.question: ALTTC in Ghaziabad is related to ________?
questions.explanation: Advanced Level Telecom Training Centre (ALTTC), Ghaziabad is an Apex level Telecom Training centre of BSNL. It was set up jointly by ITU, UNDP and Govt. of India.

questions.question: National Institute of Sports in Patiala is named after __________?
questions.explanation: Netaji Subhas National Institute of Sports commonly known as National Institute of Sports (NIS), is the Academic Wing of the Sports Authority of India (SAI) and Asia's largest Sports Institute located in city of Patiala.

questions.question: Central Institute for Cotton Research is headquartered in which state?
questions.explanation: Central Institute for Cotton Research is central research institute established in 1976 by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research. It is headquarters is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra.

questions.question: Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute is a part of ________?
questions.explanation: Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CEERI), is a pioneer research institute in India and a constituent laboratory of Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR India), New Delhi. It was established in 1953 for advanced research and development in the field of Electronics.

questions.question: CFTRI is situated in Mysore. What does "F" stand for?
questions.explanation: CFTRI stands for Central Food Technological Research Institute. CSIR−Central Food Technological Research Institute (CFTRI), Mysore (A constituent laboratory of Council of Scientific and Industrial Research, New Delhi) came into existence during 1950.

questions.question: National Power Training Institute is headquartered in which state?
questions.explanation: National Power Training Institute (NPTI), comes under Ministry of Power, Govt. of India is a National Apex body for Training and Human Resources Development in Power Sector with its headquarters at Faridabad, Haryana.

questions.question: Wadia Institute of Himalayan Geology in Dehradun comes under which ministry?
options: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
questions.explanation: Wadia Institute of Himalayan Geology, Dehradun is an autonomous research institute for the study of Geology of the Himalaya under Ministry of Science and Technology, Govt. of India.

questions.question: International Institute for Population Sciences was established in the year _____?
questions.explanation: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) serves as a regional Institute for Training and Research in Population Studies for the ESCAP region. It was established in Mumbai in July 1956.

questions.question: Institute of Forest Genetic Tree Breeding is situated in which state?
questions.explanation: Institute of Forest Genetics and Tree Breeding is a Forestry Research institute situated in Coimbatore in Tamil Nadu. It was founded in 1988.
